channel.title: New Games for Retro Consoles
channel.description: Games found and reviewed by Viv Slakes.

item.title: Narcotiendita
item.dc:creator: Carmelo Electronics
item.description:
A horror short story to read on your Game Boy.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy

Genres

  • E-Book

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Solarpunk 3077
item.dc:creator: Carmelo Electronics
item.description:
In the Year 3077, civilization survived a climate catastrophe by living in a controlled city-state called Solaris. The city and its surroundings live in harmony with nature, although under constant threat by the malicious Gray Goo, a gigantic mass of nanomachines that multiply by eating everything in their way. Trixy, a cadet of an elite group of pilots called the Sentinels, will keep Solaris and the planet safe from the Gray Goo!

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy

Genres

  • Shmup

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Pine Creek
item.dc:creator: Carmelo Electronics
item.description:
The disappearance of a young girl in the previously quiet small town of Pine Creek raises the popular belief that a cult is behind the crime and many other ritual killings before her. Her best friend will do his best to solve why, how, and who is behind it. PINE CREEK is an adventure game focused on exploration, story, and following clues. Have friends, think about life, think about death, eat tasty food, and play games in the arcade!

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Adventure
  • Mystery

Languages

  • English
  • Spanish
  • Brazilian Portuguese

Release

  • Digital
  • Physical

item.title: Slowly Fading into Data
item.dc:creator: Albert.DATA
item.description:
"Slowly Fading into Data" is an experimental narrative-driven, interactive-storytelling, action-adventure game (and a retro-synth!). A contemplative story of a human, slowly mutating into data. A transformative journey about the meaning of being human, the boundaries of experience, existence and identity. It is designed to be played more than once to discover all its hidden secrets, choices, easter eggs, and alternative endings. An intense cinematographic audiovisual experience that pushes your 8-bit perception and puts into test your exploration and philosophical skills.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Interactive Storytelling
  • Action-Adventure

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Physical
  • Digital

item.title: The Mayor of Sanctuary
item.dc:creator: NaraMakesGames
item.description:
As Yuu, the former mayor of Anzen, you had hoped for a quiet retirement away from the hustle of civic life. However, the peace you sought is shattered when a wave of cursed spirits begin to emerge from the once tranquil forests of Sanctuary. It is now up to you to return to Anzen and connect with its inhabitants to unravel the mysteries behind the unrest. Will you be able to uncover the sinister forces that lie beneath and restore harmony to Anzen? Embark on a journey of casual exploration through a large unique map, brimming with charming characters and captivating scenery. This leisurely experience offers mild combat, light puzzles, and hidden secrets waiting to be discovered. IT IS ADVISED NOT TO BUY THE PHYSICAL RELEASE

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Exploration
  • Adventure

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: The Year After
item.dc:creator: Hadrian Lin
item.description:
An emotional Gameboy experience about an invisible stranger, a family and a brutal winter. Walk through time. Seasons pass. Characters age.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy
  • Browser

Genres

  • Visual Novel

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital
  • Physical

item.title: Bridget Bishop
item.dc:creator: Fran Matsusaka
item.description:
TBD

Players

1

Platforms

  • Sega Saturn

Genres

  • Fantasy
  • Adventure
  • Puzzle

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Wing Warriors
item.dc:creator: Fran Matsusaka
item.description:
Wing Warriors is a fast paced shoot ‘em up, featuring three playable characters that promote different strategies as you try to conquer the game’s six stages and three boss battles. The game also features a score saving feature, and is playable in English, French, and Spanish.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Shmup

Languages

  • English
  • French
  • Spanish

Release

  • Physical
  • Digital

item.title: Zephyr's Pass
item.dc:creator: CRTOGRPHR
item.description:
Zephyr's Pass is a captivating, narrative-driven action-adventure game designed specifically for the GBC. Set in a land tormented by destructive winds, the game's inhabitants are forced to live in canyons and travel via low-flying airships. The story follows a young hero, Abel, who joins forces with a band of pirates to defeat Thane, a man striving to become the Wind God. To accomplish this, Abel must locate ancient pieces of armor, each granting him new abilities and the strength to save his land. The game features rich, detailed visuals that surpass many other titles on the system, both homebrew, and official release. It offers challenging puzzles that vary up the dungeons you will explore, each featuring a unique mechanic to test the player. The game's creators aim to provide an experience akin to the many great official releases for the GBC.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Action-Adventure

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital
  • Physical

item.title: Hellbreaker
item.dc:creator: Technofantasy
item.description:
Pre-release alpha demo of Hell Breaker, a new puzzle game for the Game Boy Color. Every century since the dawn of man a battle has taken place between Heaven and Hell over the souls that get lost between the realms. Each side nominates an angel to fight and the winner collects these souls for their side. In this, our year 20XX, dark angel Lilith enters the puzzle arena to battle light angel Muriel for the title of Hell Breaker.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser

Genres

  • Puzzle

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Opossum Country
item.dc:creator: BenJelter
item.description:
A story-driven horror game for Game Boy. Investigate a suspicious trailer park and uncover its secret horrors.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy Color
  • Browser

Genres

  • Horror
  • Adventure

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Decline
item.dc:creator: BenJelter
item.description:
A story-driven horror game for Game Boy. Investigate a teacher's murder and deal with the effects of old age. The game features multiple endings based on decisions you make along the way.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy
  • Browser

Genres

  • Horror
  • Adventure

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: The Last Employee DX
item.dc:creator: BenJelter
item.description:
A quick game that I made over the weekend for Mini Jam 42: SNOW The constraint for the game was that it could use no more than two colors. I also made it in two days so it's a very binary game! - BenJelter

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy

Genres

  • Visual Novel

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Game Boy color test utility
item.dc:creator: BenJelter
item.description:
I am providing a browser version as a demo but the real purpose is to put this palette editor on a Game Boy and test colors there to ensure that your palettes will work well. This utility can give you the rgb values to type into GB Studio's palette editor when you get a palette you like and it can even output a number for the color that can be used with Mico27's set palette color plug-in: https://github.com/Mico27/gbs-setPaletteColorPlugin

Players

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Software
  • Development Tool

Languages

  • None

Release

  • Digital

item.title: The Machine
item.dc:creator: BenJelter
item.description:
The Machine is a game about a little guy named Girt. Girt lives in the machine. The machine isn't perfect but it's the only thing Girt knows. Girt can choose any career he wants... as long as he has good enough test scores! By the way, Girt forgot to study for his tests. Good luck! :) The Machine is a non-linear adventure where you can get different jobs, meet new characters, and try to survive inside the machine. As you progress along different career paths you can learn more about the world and unlock new careers by scoring higher on the test the next time you play. Your choices affect the direction the machine's society goes. If you rise through the ranks you can change the course of the machine's history. I am calling the genre a 'pancake adventure' because the story tree is an experimental format where it is short but very wide so that on subsequent play-throughs things can be totally different. If you play through the demo a couple of times and make different decision you will start to see the flexibility of the story!

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Adventure
  • Sci-Fi
  • Pancake Adventure

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Physical
  • Digital

item.title: Metamorphosis Collection
item.dc:creator: BenJelter
item.description:
The Metamorphosis Collection contains three original horror games, linked together by the theme of transformation. Explore the depths of human psychology with these stories crafted by the award-winning game designer Ben Jelter. Just be careful… as you play, you may find yourself transformed as well! In Opossum Country, you play as a food delivery guy who needs to make a delivery at a trailer park. What seems like another day at work quickly unravels. Can he complete his delivery or will his curiosity lead to his ultimate demise? In Decline, you play as an elderly police detective on the verge of retirement. Wrestling with cognitive decline, she attempts to solve the seemingly simple case. Though, things may not be as they seem as rumors spread about something called the ‘Glitch Witch’… In Specimen 134, you play as a regular kid named Jason who starts to notice some very unusual things going on in his town. His friend David asks him if he wants to explore the woods but he might not like what he finds there…

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Horror
  • Adventure

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Physical
  • Digital

item.title: First Contact Protocol
item.dc:creator: BenJelter
item.description:
First Contact Protocol (FCP) is a story about encountering alien life. It takes place on a monitor vessel that is tasked with ensuring the safety of a large interstellar spaceship called the Dia Modrona. FCP is a story-driven adventure game. It features various environmental puzzles and a nonlinear story. By interacting with the puzzles and the crew in various ways, you can change the fate of the ship! The crew has different motivations that keep things interesting. You will have to interact with the ship's systems to get to one of the many endings.

Players

1

Platforms

  • ModRetro Chromatic
  • Game Boy
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Adventure
  • Sci-Fi
  • Puzzle

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Physical

item.title: OrmBlok
item.dc:creator: BenJelter, Technofantasy
item.description:
Ormblok is an arcade style falling block game with a twist. Use your blocks to create pellets in the playfield and then use the worm to eat the pellets! Each round the target goal increases dramatically. Can you make it to round 9? The game focuses on risk/reward with the things that can earn you the most points also being the riskiest things to try to do. You can learn optimal strategies for playing the game and get scores that are exponentially higher.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Puzzle

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: UNEARTHED 2024 EDITION
item.dc:creator: BenJelter
item.description:
Set in a future where humanity has all but depleted Earth's resources, UNEARTHED invites you on an interstellar journey with Max - a husband, father and employee of the off-planet mining corporate juggernaut 'Deep Space Mineral Retrieval'. Pilot your DSMR issued Mech to delve into the depths of planets, navigate perilous caverns and solve a multitude of puzzles to retrieve your quota of mineral resources and provide for your loving family back on Earth. Though Max is just your average blue collar worker, he'll uncover much more than mineral deposits during this year's contracted expedition. Prepare to embark on a sci-fi adventure where every dig brings you closer to uncovering the truth buried under alien soil. What secrets are waiting to be UNEARTHED?

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy
  • Game Boy Color
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Sci-Fi
  • Puzzle

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital
  • Physical

item.guid: Super Jacked Up Tomato Face Johnson
item.title: Super Jacked Up Tomato Face Johnson
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function
item.description:
Super Jacked Up Tomato Face Johnson is a fast paced twitch platformer made for the Game Boy Color. There's a new protein shake fresh on the shelves and Tomato Face Johnson needs to bulk up! It's on the pricey side of course, but luckily, it's on sale for a limited time... Time to get speedy! Collect all the coins to complete levels. Complete levels super fast and you will earn enough stars to progress to the next world.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy Color
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Platformer

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: The Ungrateful Son
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function
item.description:
Back in January of 2022, Robert Dorman released a video on Art Carts. He asked the question "What would a book look like on a Game Boy". I was inspired by this thought and the end result is this - "The Ungrateful Son" by the Brothers Grimm, adapted for the Game Boy. The Game Boy itself has a form factor similar to a small book, and I was interested in seeing how I could present long strings of text in a way that wasn't difficult to comprehend. I was drawn to the Brother's Grimm fairy tales when deciding what to create. The stories are reasonably short which suits the handheld and they allow for illustrations which serve to break up the text and offer a moment to rest between reading. They also contain themes and imagery that will excite children while still engaging adults. This was important to me because the Game Boy is a console that has been enjoyed by all ages since its release and I felt it's important to make sure the story caters to that same wide demographic. The story is intended for use with the Game Boy (download the ROM below and flash to a cart or similar) or the Analogue Pocket (.pocket file available to download below). I hope you enjoy The Ungrateful Son, - Tom (Gumpy Function)

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket
  • Browser

Genres

  • Art
  • E-Book

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Dicee!
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function
item.description:
Dicee! is dice puzzle game for the Game Boy and Game Boy Color.

Players

1-2

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Puzzle

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: CAPPIMON
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function
item.description:
CAPPIMON is an RPG/Platformer hybrid for the Game Boy Color. Inspired by but antithetical to the Pokemon series, this is a very short proof of concept demo for the game.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy Color
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Platformer
  • RPG

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Knit-Wit
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function
item.description:
Knit-Wit is a push block puzzle game in the style of Nintendo's Game Boy Color. Puzzle your way through 15 levels as you find enough wool to knit each of your family members a warm jumper and stave off the winter chills.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Puzzle

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: CUPID
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function
item.description:
Something or someone has broken the Heart, a magical relic that stitches all things together. Without it, the universe will slowly unravel and everything will fall into darkness. Play as a cute little Cupid, tasked with mending the broken Heart. Do your best to spread love and happiness to all that you meet and prevent the darkness from taking hold!

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Puzzle

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Super Dassalo Land
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function
item.description:
Tommy Dassalo is busily preparing for the cultural event of the millennium: the taping of his stand-up comedy special ‘SCAM ARTIST’. All of a sudden, Jiko, an evil phantom, appears and traps him inside the pages of his notebook! Now it’s up to Tommy and his crusty little yappy dog Kewpie to travel across three worlds, piecing together his stand-up material and using his microphone whip, ground pound and wall jump to defeat Jiko’s minions and save comedy! PLEASE NOTE: Super Dassalo Land features crude humour and may not be suitable for kids.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy Color
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Platformer

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Feed IT Souls: DUAL
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function
item.description:
Feed IT Souls: Dual is a fighting game for the Game Boy Color, designed for two players sharing one console.

Players

2

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Fighting

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Feed IT Souls: DOME Edition
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function
item.description:
You are the offspring of IT, a bio-technological monstrosity after only one thing - delicious souls! Seek out and retrieve souls to feed your master. His power is your power. Every soul retrieved will enhance your mobility as you explore your surroundings. Feed IT Souls: Department Of Martian Efficiency Edition is an anti-X, anti-Musk, all-round anti-Techno Feudalist metroidvania for the Game Boy Color and remake of the GB Compo 23 game jam version from top to bottom.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Metroidvania

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Feed IT Souls
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function
item.description:
You are the offspring of IT, a bio-technological monstrosity after only one thing - delicious souls! Seek out and retrieve souls to feed your master. His power is your power, and every soul retrieved will enhance your mobility as you explore your surroundings

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy Color
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Metroidvania

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Virtual BMO
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function
item.description:
Turn your Game Boy or Analogue Pocket into Adventure Time's lovable walking handheld console with Virtual BMO! I made this for my daughter and thought I would share with any of the Adventure Time fans out there. Just place the downloadable Game Boy ROM onto a writable Game Boy cartridge or similar or download the .pocket file for Analogue Pocket users and you're away! Or, if you just want to have a look, play here in the browser. Change Beemo's expression at will or browse his desktop to find all sorts of surprises. There is now a playable game to be found on the desktop too!

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Software
  • Platformer

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Lee Carvallo's Putting Challenge II
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function
item.description:
Hi-D-Ho Gamerinos! André & Wally Productions present Lee Carvallo's Putting Challenge 2, a sequel to the wholly unsuccessful, critically panned golfing simulator released back in 1995. In this Point & Click Adventure, you play as Lee Carvallo. Puzzle your way through a series of events in his life. Sleep where he sleeps, eat what he eats, golf where he golfs!

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Point & Click

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: My Dinner with André
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function
item.description:
Hi-D-Ho Gamerinos! My Dinner with André is a Simpsons Fan Game inspired by the Noise Land Video Arcade game featured in the episode 'Boy Scoutz 'n the Hood' from Season 5. Join actors André Gregory and Wallace Shawn at the dinner table as they discuss the important matters of life. Choose from three separate retorts as you progress through an approximately 10 minute long discussion created in the spirit of Louis Malle's 1981 comedy film of the same name.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Visual Novel

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: DVD-Logo Screensaver
item.dc:creator: Pearacidic Games
item.description:
Relive the glory days of boring meeting rooms of yesteryear with the DVD logo Screensaver - now for Game Boy! You'll be the envy of everyone in your cubicle pod!* Flash it on a cart, or experience the nostalgia in your favorite emulator! *Your cubicle pod may not have envious people, or any other people, in which case, this would be an untrue statement.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Game Boy Color
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Software

Languages

  • None

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Monster Orc-Arina
item.dc:creator: Pearacidic Games
item.description:
A pick-up-and-play instrument is hard to come by on the Game Boy™, as most music carts are complex DAW-type systems with many options. Monster Orc-arina means to remedy that by giving anyone the ability to create music and have some fun in the process. Since the built-in note indicator shows you the note you are about to or are currently playing, it can also be useful to mock up melodies to then translate to hUGETracker or GBT Player.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Game Boy Color
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Music
  • Software

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Knucklebones
item.dc:creator: Pearacidic Games
item.description:
Rules Each player takes their turn rolling the die and selecting a column to place it. If the die matches any dice on the other side, they are removed and their points are removed from that player's score. The game ends when either side fills up with dice. The winner is determined by total points on their side of the board. If both scores match, the game ends in a Tie. Points Points are accumulated by placing and creating combos in a column. Each die is worth its face value. Combos are worth the total value of the dice times the size of the combo.

Players

2

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Turn-Based
  • Strategy
  • Board Game

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.guid: Little Nemo: The Slumberland Hero DEMO
item.title: Little Nemo: The Slumberland Hero DEMO
item.dc:creator: Pearacidic Games
item.description:
When Nemo's friend Flip discovers the true power of dreams, his mischievous side gets the best of him and he puts his trust in a mysterious force to give him more power. Soon, Flip wields and quickly loses control of this magic, letting it out into the dream world, twisting good dreams and turning them into nightmares. Join Nemo as he returns to Slumberland to put an end to nightmares once and for all with the help of the Morning Star, the scepter entrusted to him by King Morpheus, and other dream-made weapons of power. Experience the joy of playing through whimsical levels such as the Sugar Surplus, where candy and treats come to life, and many more! Defeat the nightmares, return Slumberland to peace and happiness once more, and prove yourself as the Slumberland hero!

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Adventure
  • Platformer
  • Bullet Hell
  • Shmup

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Grimace's Birthday
item.dc:creator: krool toys, Gumpy Function, Pearacidic Games
item.description:
In Grimace's Birthday, Grimace throws his birthday party at McDonald's, but some of his best McDonaldland friends — Birdie the Early Bird, the Hamburglar, and the McNugget Buddies — are missing! With only 30 minutes to spare, Grimace needs to find them before it's too late! Help Grimace find his missing friends in time to blow the candles out, and collect enough birthday shakes for his guests along the way. Immerse yourself in Grimace’s world as he races around classic McDonald’s birthday scenes to find his pals all in a quest to save his birthday!

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy Color
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • TBD

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Tempus Gear DEMO
item.dc:creator: Pearacidic Games
item.description:
In Tempus Gear, you play Jupiter Cogswell, a mechanic and the owner of the Gilded Gear repair shop. Explore and uncover the mystery of a stolen keepsake, an underground conspiracy, and what may be the end of the world as we know it. Jump into the action and solve puzzles to reveal the truth behind the steam-fueled city of Ignis Cadere.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Adventure
  • Puzzle
  • Steampunk

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: In The Dark 2
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function, Pearacidic Games
item.description:
A deadly virus is corrupting the Federation’s neural network, threatening to isolate the galaxy. As Captain Ikalo Pann, follow cryptic clues, solve intricate puzzles, and explore alien worlds to stop the spread and uncover a deep sci-fi mystery.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Game Boy Color
  • ModRetro Chromatic

Genres

  • Adventure
  • Puzzle
  • Sci-Fi

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Physical
  • Digital

item.title: In The Dark
item.dc:creator: Gumpy Function, Pearacidic Games
item.description:
It was a simple mission: Investigate an unidentified distress signal from a cruiser-class ship orbiting a barren planet in the Rigel system. Ikalo Pann, the Captain of the Star Leviathan, navigated through the debris surrounding the derelict ship until it was within scanner range. A scan of the ship pinged with no purchase for organics, life support systems were still functional, but losing power. With no signs of life coming from the vessel, they feared the worst but proceeded to dock with the airlock and climb aboard. Upon entering the main deck, they noticed the warped sound of a klaxon going off, echoing down the halls. Ikalo signaled to her crew to follow her further into the ship towards the living quarters. As they entered the next room, the warning alarm suddenly stopped and the doors behind them shut tight, followed by the grinding gears of a locking mechanism. The display on a monitor in the middle of the room came to life, a cursor pulsed rhythmically, illuminating the Captain's surroundings with a soft neon green glow. Suddenly, a pattern of lights animated on the monitor, and as they came to rest, a puzzle appeared over the on-screen grid. It was clear that this was all tied to the ship. They had fallen into a trap! There was only one hope - solve the puzzles to bypass the locks... and as the power continued to drain from what little remained of the backup power and life support systems, it was only a matter of time before they succumbed to their fate.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Adventure
  • Puzzle
  • Sci-Fi

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Tales of Monsterland DX
item.dc:creator: Joel J Games
item.description:
Save a village besieged by monsters by uncovering their origin. Run, jump, and battle through a magical world while gaining new abilities. Inspired by classic 8-bit platformers, it’s a fast-paced adventure with charm and challenge.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy Color
  • ModRetro Chromatic

Genres

  • Platformer

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Physical

item.title: Tales of Monsterland
item.dc:creator: Joel J Games
item.description:
Save a village besieged by monsters by uncovering their origin. Run, jump, and battle through a magical world while gaining new abilities. Inspired by classic 8-bit platformers, it’s a fast-paced adventure with charm and challenge.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Game Boy
  • Browser
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Platformer

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Physical
  • Digital

item.title: Neon Nova
item.dc:creator: playinstinct
item.description:
TBD

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Driving

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Legacy of Verintia
item.dc:creator: playinstinct
item.description:
Welcome to Verintia! Legacy of Verintia is an open-world fantasy RPG for the original Game Boy developed in 2023. The game lets players choose their own path. As you can earn experience points from every meaningful action, you can make progress in whichever way you want – help the local townsfolk, hunt monsters and sell their materials, collect and sell ingredients, help out on a farm, go fishing or play a card game at the local pub.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy

Genres

  • RPG
  • Fantasy

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Ghost of the Arcade
item.dc:creator: playinstinct
item.description:
- 5 different monster-related arcade games - A story full of dark humor and gaming references - 32 collectible figures to get from a gacha machine - Arcade Mode: Just play the arcade games without the story

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • TBD

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Capybara Village
item.dc:creator: playinstinct
item.description:
- Enjoy the serene Capybara Village - Go on explorations to find items - Sell items to local shops - Buy / find new costumes for your capybara - Buy / find new furniture for your home

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • TBD

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: MY FRIENDLY LITTLE ISLAND DELUXE
item.dc:creator: playinstinct
item.description:
My Friendly Little Island Deluxe is a cute game about personal growth and making friends. It starts out as a slow, simplistic adventure game. However, with every new skill you unlock, the game’s dynamics change more and more into a fast-paced platformer.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Adventure
  • Platformer

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Buck and the Cursed Cartridge
item.dc:creator: playinstinct
item.description:
When Buck, a die-hard retro gamer, buys a mysterious cartridge labeled “DEFINITELY NOT A CURSED CARTRIDGE” from his local GameStop, things go sideways fast. The moment he pops it into his Chromatic, he’s sucked through the screen and trapped inside the game! To escape, Buck must battle through pixelated worlds, outsmart glitchy bosses, and uncover who—or what—is pulling the strings. With help from a rogue hacker, hidden cheats, and his trusty blaster, Buck’s only way out is to beat the game itself.

Players

1

Platforms

  • ModRetro Chromatic
  • Game Boy Color

Genres

  • Platformer

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Physical

item.title: Doomslinger Dungeon
item.dc:creator: playinstinct
item.description:
Play as the Doomslinger, a mysterious gunslinger. Venture into a creepy dungeon and defeat all kinds of spooky monsters like ghosts, zombies and pumpkin monsters.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • First-Person Shooter
  • Dungeon Crawler
  • Roguelite

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Press "A" to Get Up
item.dc:creator: Cambroth
item.description:
It's, uhh.... It's about Executive Dysfunction.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy

Genres

  • TBD

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: The Death of Me
item.dc:creator: Cambroth
item.description:
Step into the shoes of an unlucky chronic illness patient in "The Death of Me": A medical-horror inspired by real life experiences battling the complexities of day-to-day life with mental and physical illnesses.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy

Genres

  • TBD

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Bat-Son's Nightmare Demo
item.dc:creator: Ice.Cold.Blood
item.description:
Bat-Son is finally getting his own game! What? Nobody asked for that? Well... here it is anyway. Prepare to explore a dungeon where danger isn't just a probability - it's a guarantee. Can you navigate Bat-Son to safety and unlock the final gate, or will you succumb to death time and time again, forever leaving the mysteries of the nightmare unsolved?

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Platformer

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Batty Zabella 2 XOXO XMAS
item.dc:creator: Ice.Cold.Blood
item.description:
Batty's back for a Christmas-themed adventure! Don't expect a typical holiday season, though - there are still plenty of creepy, crawly things lurking in her home. Explore Batty's home using the arrow keys. Important items will often be displayed with a sparkle effect. Depending on the context, players may need to press up or down to interact with objects in a scene.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket
  • 3DS

Genres

  • Point & Click
  • Adventure

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Batty Zabella
item.dc:creator: Ice.Cold.Blood
item.description:
Batty Zabella is a point-and-click horror comedy designed to push the limits of outdated hardware, and provide a compelling experience even by 2022 standards. It also marks the debut of a new horror icon; Batty Zabella! Help save her family and rid her home of phantoms. She may give you sass while doing it, but you'll love it.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket
  • 3DS

Genres

  • Point & Click
  • Adventure

Languages

  • English
  • German

Release

  • Digital

item.title: Soul Void
item.dc:creator: Kadabura
item.description:
Soul Void is a short, 1-3 hour experience made in the style of a gameboy-era game. Explore the odd landscapes of the void, help lost souls you find along the way, and face your inner demons as you attempt to find a way home.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy

Genres

  • Interactive Fiction

Languages

  • English

Release

  • Digital

item.guid: He Fucked The Girl Out of Me
item.title: He Fucked The Girl Out of Me
item.dc:creator: Taylor McCue
item.description:
A game about sex work and trauma.

Opinion

The developer uses this game to tell a very difficult, personal story. The game can be quite hard to stomach and the trigger warnings the game provides should not be ignored.

Players

1

Platforms

  • Browser
  • Game Boy
  • Analogue Pocket

Genres

  • Visual Novel
  • Art

Languages

  • English
  • Japanese
  • Spanish
  • French
  • Turkish
  • Brazilian Portuguese

Release

  • Digital
